title: Korak 13

challengeFiles.name: main

tests.text: You should have a for loop in your __str__ method.

When self.items contains Movie('Dances with Wolves', 1990, 'Kevin Costner', 224) and Movie('Annie Hall', 1977, 'Woody Allen', 93), your __str__ method should return Media Catalogue (2 items): 1. Dances with Wolves (1990) - 224 min, Kevin Costner 2. Annie Hall (1977) - 93 min, Woody Allen .
tests.testString:
({
  test: () => runPython(`
    import io
    import sys
        
    captured_output = io.StringIO()
    sys.stdout = captured_output

    _catalogue = MediaCatalogue()
    _catalogue.add(Movie('Dances with Wolves', 1990, 'Kevin Costner', 224))
    _catalogue.add(Movie('Annie Hall', 1977, 'Woody Allen', 93))
    print(_catalogue)
        
    sys.stdout = sys.__stdout__
    output = captured_output.getvalue()

    _expected = """Media Catalogue (2 items):

    1. Dances with Wolves (1990) - 224 min, Kevin Costner
    2. Annie Hall (1977) - 93 min, Woody Allen
    """
    assert _expected in output
  `)
})

tests.text: When self.items contains Movie('Barry Lyndon', 1975, 'Stanley Kubrick', 184) and Movie('Fahrenheit 451', 1966, 'Francois Truffaut', 112), your __str__ method should return Media Catalogue (2 items): 1. Barry Lyndon (1975) - 184 min, Stanley Kubrick 2. Fahrenheit 451 (1966) - 112 min, Francois Truffaut .
tests.testString:
({
  test: () => runPython(`
    import io
    import sys
        
    captured_output = io.StringIO()
    sys.stdout = captured_output

    _catalogue = MediaCatalogue()
    _catalogue.add(Movie('Barry Lyndon', 1975, 'Stanley Kubrick', 184))
    _catalogue.add(Movie('Fahrenheit 451', 1966, 'Francois Truffaut', 112))
    print(_catalogue)
        
    sys.stdout = sys.__stdout__
    output = captured_output.getvalue()

    _expected = """Media Catalogue (2 items):

    1. Barry Lyndon (1975) - 184 min, Stanley Kubrick
    2. Fahrenheit 451 (1966) - 112 min, Francois Truffaut
    """
    assert _expected in output
  `)
})

tests.text: Your __str__ method should return Media Catalogue (empty) when self.items is empty.
tests.testString:
({
  test: () => runPython(`
    import io
    import sys
        
    captured_output = io.StringIO()
    sys.stdout = captured_output
        
    print(MediaCatalogue())
        
    sys.stdout = sys.__stdout__
    output = captured_output.getvalue()
        
    assert "Media Catalogue (empty)" in output
  `)
})

description:
Odmah nakon deklarisanja varijable result, kreirajte petlju for koja koristi enumeraciju za iteriranje kroz stavke u katalogu i dodaje u result string sa sledećim formatom: N. movie gde je N numerički indeks koji počinje od 1, a movie je string reprezentacija stavke.

String završite znakom novog reda i vratite result nakon petlje.
